objective_pack.title: Protect Company
objective_pack.summary: Favor moves that lower legal exposure, preserve trust, limit commercial damage, and keep internal execution drag manageable.

historical_business_state.summary: Recorded business state centers on approval and escalation pressure and relationship stability.

indicators.label: Approval and escalation pressure
indicators.summary: Approval and escalation pressure is high in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Relationship stability
indicators.summary: Relationship stability looks strong in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Commercial position
indicators.summary: Commercial position looks strong in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Exposure risk
indicators.summary: Exposure risk stays limited in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Internal handling load
indicators.summary: Internal handling load stays limited in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Execution delay
indicators.summary: Execution delay stays limited in the recorded path.

implications: Approval and escalation pressure is high in the recorded path.
Relationship stability looks strong in the recorded path.
Commercial position looks strong in the recorded path.

candidates.label: Narrow internal-only draft
candidates.prompt: Keep the draft inside a very small executive and legal loop, delay wider circulation, and hold on public messaging until the internal record is tight.
candidates.explanation: Hold the draft in a very small internal loop.

forecast.summary: Predicted risk moves down by 0.270, with escalation delta -1 and external-send delta 0.

business_state_change.summary: Much lower approval and escalation pressure. Trade-off: Much higher internal handling load.

candidates.label: Controlled transition message
candidates.prompt: Keep the message disciplined and factual, coordinate the release through legal and communications, and avoid extra claims.
